validated: Three-way parallel pipeline contains inert text-layer placeholder
JPEG Blob URL page pipeline adds self-inflicted fidelity loss
Reader components are oversized and responsibility-heavy
partially_validated: Vectorization naming overstates what is actually HTML segmentation / virtualization metadata
historical_residue: canvas.width = 0 documented as key architecture optimization while the old provider is now being removed

additional_findings: PDF text extraction still exists for search, so the missing text layer is a product decision rather than a hard capability limit.
Fallback documentation and real reopen semantics diverged after init() started releasing the source ArrayBuffer.
Current working tree already forces PDF into scroll-only mode and is removing the old single-file provider.
